basic_details.job_title: Telangana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 178 Anganwadi Teacher & Helper Posts in Bhadradri Kothagudem District
basic_details.organization_name: District Women Development & Child Welfare (WCD) Department, Bhadradri Kothagudem
basic_details.short_information: The District Program Officer, ICDS, Bhadradri Kothagudem has released a notification inviting applications for the recruitment of Anganwadi Teachers against vacancies in 11 ICDS projects across the district. The notification was announced in a press release, and the official AWT vacancy format has also been released, listing vacancies center-wise (Anganwadi Center-wise) along with the applicable reservation category for each post.

application_fee.details: The available sources do not mention any application fee details for this recruitment.

age_limit.details: As on 1 July 2026, the age of candidates should be between 18 and 35 years.

qualification.details: Candidates should have passed Intermediate (10+2) as the minimum educational qualification for the post of Anganwadi Teacher. | As on 1 July 2026, the age of candidates should be between 18 and 35 years.

salary_details.details: The available sources do not mention the honorarium or salary details for the Anganwadi Teacher post. Candidates are advised to check the official notification or the local ICDS Project Office for this information.

how_to_apply: Locate the Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026 notification link.
Register and fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and local residence details.
Select the preferred Anganwadi Center/project and check the applicable reservation category as per the official AWC-wise vacancy list.
Upload the required documents as specified in the official notification.
Review the application form carefully and submit it before 18 July 2026, 5:00 PM.
Report for document verification during the period 20 July 2026 to 7 August 2026, as intimated by the concerned ICDS Project Office.
Applications can be submitted online only; no other mode of application has been mentioned in the available notification details.
important_instructions: Complete details of the recruitment, including reservation category for each Anganwadi Center, are available on the official website and at the respective ICDS Project Office. Candidates are advised to contact their local ICDS Project Office for project-specific queries and clarifications. Applications must be submitted online only through http://wdcw.tg.nic.in within the specified application window. Candidates should ensure they meet the local eligibility, age, and educational qualification criteria before applying.

content_sections.heading: Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026: Overview
content_sections.text: The District Program Officer, ICDS, Bhadradri Kothagudem has released a notification inviting applications for the recruitment of Anganwadi Teachers against vacancies in 11 ICDS projects across the district. The notification was announced in a press release, and the official AWT vacancy format has also been released, listing vacancies center-wise (Anganwadi Center-wise) along with the applicable reservation category for each post.

content_sections.heading: Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 178 Anganwadi Teacher vacancies have been notified across 11 ICDS projects in Bhadradri Kothagudem district. The project-wise vacancy break-up is given below. The detailed Anganwadi Center (AWC)-wise vacancy list is available in the official AWT/AWH Vacancies Format released by the District Welfare Officer, WCD&SC Department, Bhadradri Kothagudem. This list specifies, for each of the 178 centers, the AWC ID, sector name, and the reserved category (such as SC, ST, OC, BC-A, EWS, VH, or Ex-Servicemen/OC) applicable to that particular post, along with the vacancy validity period of 3 July 2026 to 18 July 2026. Candidates are advised to check the reservation category applicable to their preferred Anganwadi Center on the official notification before applying.

content_sections.heading: Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates should have passed Intermediate (10+2) as the minimum educational qualification for the post of Anganwadi Teacher. As on 1 July 2026, the age of candidates should be between 18 and 35 years.

content_sections.heading: Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026: Selection Preference Criteria
content_sections.text: As per the notification, the following preference criteria apply during selection: Preference is given to local candidates (residents of the local area under the concerned Anganwadi Center/project). Women with disabilities who use assistive aids and appliances are given due consideration. Unmarried, widowed, or divorced women without adequate support are given weightage in selection. Candidates should have the ability to teach basic education related to child welfare and Anganwadi activities, and to protect and nurture children, as part of the role's responsibilities. The official notification does not specify a separate written examination or interview stage; candidates are advised to refer to the official website and the local ICDS Project Office for complete details on the selection methodology and reservation-related weightage.

content_sections.heading: Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026: Salary / Honorarium
content_sections.text: The available sources do not mention the honorarium or salary details for the Anganwadi Teacher post. Candidates are advised to check the official notification or the local ICDS Project Office for this information.

content_sections.heading: Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The available sources do not mention any application fee details for this recruitment.

content_sections.heading: Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026: Required Documents
content_sections.text: The available sources do not specify a detailed document checklist. Candidates are advised to keep their educational certificates, age proof, residence/local eligibility proof, and category certificate (if applicable) ready, and to refer to the official notification on http://wdcw.tg.nic.in or the local ICDS Project Office for the exact list of documents required at the time of application and verification.

content_sections.heading: Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026: How to Apply Online
content_sections.text: Visit the official website: http://wdcw.tg.nic.in. Locate the Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026 notification link. Register and fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and local residence details. Select the preferred Anganwadi Center/project and check the applicable reservation category as per the official AWC-wise vacancy list. Upload the required documents as specified in the official notification. Review the application form carefully and submit it before 18 July 2026, 5:00 PM. Report for document verification during the period 20 July 2026 to 7 August 2026, as intimated by the concerned ICDS Project Office. Applications can be submitted online only; no other mode of application has been mentioned in the available notification details.

content_sections.heading: Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Complete details of the recruitment, including reservation category for each Anganwadi Center, are available on the official website and at the respective ICDS Project Office. Candidates are advised to contact their local ICDS Project Office for project-specific queries and clarifications. Applications must be submitted online only through http://wdcw.tg.nic.in within the specified application window. Candidates should ensure they meet the local eligibility, age, and educational qualification criteria before applying.

faq.question: Q1. What is Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a recruitment drive by the District Women Development and Child Welfare Department, Bhadradri Kothagudem, to fill 178 Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) vacancies across 11 ICDS projects in the district.

faq.question: Q2. How many Anganwadi Teacher posts are vacant in Bhadradri Kothagudem?
faq.answer: A total of 178 AWT posts are vacant, distributed across the Aswaraopeta, Burgampahad, Chandrugonda, Cherla, Dammapeta, Dummugudem, Kothagudem, Manuguru, Palvancha, Tekulapally, and Yellandu ICDS projects.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process started on 3 July 2026, and the last date to apply is 18 July 2026 up to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As on 1 July 2026, candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Anganwadi Teacher post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Intermediate (10+2) as the minimum educational qualification.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply online for Bhadradri Kothagudem Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online only through the official website http://wdcw.tg.nic.in by filling in the application form and submitting it before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. When will document verification take place?
faq.answer: Document verification for shortlisted/applied candidates is scheduled from 20 July 2026 to 7 August 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any preference given during selection?
faq.answer: Yes, preference is given to local candidates, women with disabilities using assistive aids, and unmarried, widowed, or divorced women without adequate support.
